title: Conversational Designer / Prompt UX Designer
companyDescription: Narrative AI is a bootstrapped startup building AI writing tools for content creators and marketers. Revenue: $2M ARR. Team of 12. Fully remote, distributed across 8 countries.
description:
Narrative AI builds AI writing tools that help content creators produce blog posts, social media content, and marketing copy. Our product isn't just a text generator — it's a collaborative writing partner that understands your brand voice, adapts to your audience, and iterates based on your feedback.

We need a conversational designer who can design the dialogue between our users and our AI writing assistant. How does the assistant understand intent? How does it ask clarifying questions? How does it present drafts and handle edits? How does it learn and adapt to individual user preferences over time?

This role is equal parts conversation design, prompt design, and UX writing. You'll shape every word the AI produces and every interaction a user has with it. It's the most creative, most impactful role in our company.

As an early team member, you'll have significant influence on product direction, company culture, and the evolution of the conversational AI design discipline.
responsibilities: Design the conversation model for our AI writing assistant — how it asks questions, presents drafts, incorporates feedback, and learns from user corrections
Write and iterate on the prompts, constraints, and examples that shape the AI's writing behavior and style adaptation
Craft every piece of UX copy: system messages, error states, empty states, onboarding flows, and in-context explanations
Create conversation flow diagrams and prototype test them with real users
Research how content creators currently use AI tools, identify pain points, and design better interaction models
Develop conversation design guidelines and prompt design patterns for our growing team
Collaborate with engineering to implement conversation features and iterate based on usage data
Contribute to the broader conversation design community through public writing and speaking
requirements: 3+ years of conversation design or UX writing experience, preferably in AI products
Strong writing skills — you can write clear, concise, on-brand copy in any tone
Understanding of prompt design and how to write effective instructions for LLMs
Experience prototyping and testing conversations (diagrams, scripts, Figma, or dedicated conversation design tools)
Ability to think systemically — how does a conversation flow change when the AI is uncertain? When it disagrees? When it needs to escalate?
Self-starter who can work independently in a small, distributed team
Portfolio or samples of conversation designs, prompt templates, or UX writing
niceTo-have: Experience designing for creative or professional workflows (writing, design, coding)
Background in linguistics, communications, or related field
Experience with prompt engineering or LLM behavior design
Public writing about conversation design, prompt design, or AI UX
Experience working in a startup environment
